---
id: get-device-definitions
title: "Query Device Model Definition"
description: "Get detailed model definition for specified devices, including device types, an endpoint list, property lists, etc."
sidebar_label: "Query Device Model Definition"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/aiot-api/aiot-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Query Device Model Definition"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/devices/definitions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get detailed model definition for specified devices, including device types, an endpoint list, property lists, etc.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"Access token obtained via authorization."},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"App ID assigned when creating an application on the [Aqara Developer Platform](https://developer.aqara.com)."},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"Key ID assigned when creating an application on the [Aqara Developer Platform](https://developer.aqara.com)."},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"Random string, should be different for each request."},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"Request timestamp in milliseconds."},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"Request signature. For information on how to generate the signature, please refer to [Sign Generation Rules](https://opendoc.aqara.com/en/docs/developmanual/apiIntroduction/signGenerationRules.html)."},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"Language, defaults to English. Supports 'zh' and 'en'."},{"name":"deviceIds","in":"query","required":true,"description":"List of device IDs, supporting up to 10 devices per query. Example: deviceIds=xx1,xx2 or deviceIds=xx1&deviceIds=xx2.","schema":{"type":"array","maxItems":10,"items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"includeValues","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Whether to include the current value (`value`) and reported time (`time`) of each trait. When set to `false` (default), only the capability definition metadata is returned; the structure is the same as with `true`, but the trait `value` fields may be empty or contain inaccurate/old values. When set to `true`, the current trait values of the device will be retrieved.\n","schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
